---
title: Review on defective carbon for sodium-ion and vanadium flow batteries
date: 2023-12-23
categories: [Publication]
---

Sophie McArdle led a new <a href="https://doi.org/10.1002/celc.202300512" target="_blank">review</a> in ChemElectroChem covering defective carbon materials for next-generation stationary energy storage across sodium-ion batteries and vanadium redox flow batteries. The review maps defect engineering strategies and their effects on electrode performance, providing a comprehensive guide for the field. Thanks to Dr Hannes Radinger for forming this collaboration.
